2606.19948.title: Advancing DialNav through Automatic Embodied Dialog Augmentation
2606.19948.paper_summary: For embodied agents capable of physical interaction, the capability to create and understand dialog is crucial to ensure both safety and effectiveness. While DialNav~\cite{han2025dialnav} provides a framework for holistic evaluation of the dialog--execution loop in photorealistic indoor navigation, its performance remains limited by a critical scarcity of training data (2K episodes). To address this, we propose an automatic generation pipeline, and construct the \textbf{RAINbow} dataset, a large-scale training dataset with 238K episodes for DialNav. Our pipeline converts existing VLN datasets into multi-turn dialog and creates cost-efficient and high-quality dataset. Then, we introduce two additional complementary advances to unlock the data's full potential: (1) Dual-Strategy Training, a navigation training scheme to align the navigation training with the dynamic dialog-navigation loop, and (2) a localization model that leverages VLN knowledge. By combining these complementary solutions, our model substantially outperforms the baseline in success rate on both \textbf{Val Seen} (58.24, \textbf{+89\%}) and \textbf{Val Unseen} (29.05, \textbf{+100\%}) splits, establishing a new state of the art.
2606.19948.paper_summary_zh: 對於能夠進行物理互動的具身代理，創建和理解對話的能力對於確保安全性和有效性至關重要。雖然 DialNav~\cite{han2025dialnav} 提供了一個全面評估對話執行循環的框架，但其性能仍受到訓練數據嚴重不足（2K 集）的限制。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個自動生成管道，並構建了 \textbf{RAINbow} 數據集，這是一個擁有 238K 集的 DialNav 大規模訓練數據集。我們的管道將現有的 VLN 數據集轉換為多輪對話，並創建成本效益高且質量優良的數據集。然後，我們引入了兩項額外的互補進展，以釋放數據的全部潛力：（1）雙策略訓練，一種導航訓練方案，旨在將導航訓練與動態對話導航循環對齊，以及（2）利用 VLN 知識的定位模型。通過結合這些互補解決方案，我們的模型在 \textbf{Val Seen}（58.24，\textbf{+89\%}）和 \textbf{Val Unseen}（29.05，\textbf{+100\%}）分割上的成功率顯著超越基線，樹立了新的技術標杆。
2606.19948.author: Leekyeung Han et.al.
2606.19948.authors: Leekyeung Han, Sangwon Jung, Hyunji Min, Jinseong Jeong, Minyoung Kim, Paul Hongsuck Seo
